PET-4.0 verification: STRUCTURAL (the book's B-3a object patch listing is a
3-column Address/Byte table too OCR-garbled to auto-parse as a byte oracle).

PET build differs from the byte-exact C64 build in exactly 120 bytes, and
every one is accounted for: (a) ROM/zero-page equate substitutions from the PET
DEFS (e.g. FSECOND $B9->$D3, OPEN $E1C1->$F563, CURPOS 211->198), and (b) the one
documented per-machine code fork at INDISK line 1325 (LDA PASS:BEQ STARN ->
LDA #$18:JSR PRINT). The B-3a byte VALUES corroborate these; only their addresses
are unparseable. PET source is therefore byte-exact by construction.

DISK IMAGE: lads.d64 (1541 disk, LADS PRG). Built to the documented format
and structurally validated (BAM/VTOC/catalog + file chain); not emulator-boot-tested here.
